When to use:

Upgrade to or implement features on Spring Boot 3.5 (final 3.x release). Use when moving from 3.4 to 3.5, adopting 3.5 configuration and observability improvements, fixing 3.5 breaking changes, or staying on Spring Framework 6 before a Boot 4 migration.
